decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared self-initiated infectious-disease reports with weekly recall questionnaires and sentinel surveillance, quantifying false negatives and incidence underestimation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit validation study of reporting sensitivity, specificity, and underreporting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluated concordance, overreporting, and underreporting between parental HPV-vaccination reports and provider histories.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Directly quantifies reporting accuracy and its effects on disparity estimates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used HPV serology to validate reported vaccination coverage and identify possible underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit biological validation of surveillance coverage reports.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared self-reported antiretroviral use with a laboratory drug assay and estimated sensitivity, specificity, and nondisclosure.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of self-reported treatment use.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used provider-verified HPV-vaccination data to quantify inaccurate parental reporting and its multilevel correlates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of overreporting, underreporting, and report accuracy.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared parental recall of HPV-vaccine-naive status with electronic health records and modeled correlates of accurate recall.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct record-based validation of parental reporting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared HIV positivity among surveillance participants and nonparticipants to assess underestimation associated with consent-based recruitment.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of participation-related surveillance bias.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared HIV positivity among participating and nonparticipating injecting-drug users to evaluate underestimation after a surveillance-method change.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct assessment of nonparticipation bias in surveillance estimates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared HIV positivity in participating and nonparticipating female sex workers and quantified prevalence underestimation from selective nonparticipation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic analysis of surveillance nonparticipation bias.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimated VAERS reporting sensitivity for anaphylaxis and Guillain-Barré syndrome using Vaccine Safety Datalink incidence estimates as denominators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assessed hospital morbidity-code sensitivity against laboratory-confirmed Campylobacter diagnoses and demonstrated substantial underreporting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared death-certificate reporting with electronic health records among HCV-infected decedents and quantified persistent underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of cause-of-death reporting completeness.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared maternal interview reports of pregnancy infections and medications with primary-care records, estimating sensitivity, specificity, and resulting odds-ratio changes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit record-based validation of retrospective self-report measurements.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Linked survey responses to clinic records and estimated sensitivity, specificity, overreporting, and underreporting for HIV testing, status, and treatment.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of survey-based HIV measures.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assessed concordance between self-reported alcohol use and two objective biomarkers, concluding that underreporting was minimal.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit biomarker validation of self-reported behavior.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared parent and daughter reports of HPV-vaccination status and examined underreporting and determinants of agreement.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit validation of parental vaccination reports.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared registered and survey-based HIV transmission modes and identified significant misclassification of injecting-drug-use and heterosexual transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct assessment of HIV-surveillance classification accuracy.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a constrained bivariate P-spline method for predicting symptomatic-but-not-yet-reported cases and producing nowcasts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development with an outbreak illustration and accuracy assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents the NobBS Bayesian smoothing approach for reporting-delay nowcasting and evaluates it across dengue and influenza settings.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit method development, comparative evaluation, implementation guidance, and R software.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes a random-forest model for nowcasting delayed COVID-19 incidence and compares it with a hierarchical Bayesian model.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and evaluation of a new nowcasting model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a hierarchical Bayesian temporal model that imputes final COVID-19 test counts from partial counts under reporting lag.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological source for Bayesian nowcasting under delayed reporting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes a statistical methodology using historical lag distributions to predict true daily COVID-19 quantities and uncertainty.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit reporting-delay nowcasting methodology derived from the removal method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes NowcastPNN, a novel probabilistic neural network for estimating occurred-but-not-yet-reported dengue cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit method development and benchmark evaluation for reporting-delay nowcasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a non-stationary survival-analysis nowcasting approach and the Nowcast-It R and R-Shiny toolbox.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological and software-development source for reporting-delay adjustment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and validates a family of baseline nowcasting methods plus the baselinenowcast R package.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methods, validation, benchmarking, and software source.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an algorithm using observed reporting-delay distributions to correct real-time influenza hospitalization counts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a reporting-delay correction algorithm.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops Bayesian models for occurred-but-not-yet-reported outbreak events, including right-truncated and time-varying delay distributions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of Bayesian incidence nowcasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applied reporting-delay adjustment to Ebola incidence and effective-reproduction-number estimates in the Democratic Republic of Congo.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete real-time outbreak application of reporting-delay-adjusted incidence analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a regional nowcasting model linking COVID-19 registration dates to subsequent fatal outcomes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological source for spatially structured fatal-incidence nowcasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an extended hierarchical Bayesian model for COVID-19 nowcasting with time-varying and weekday-dependent reporting delays.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides methodological details, evaluation, code, and operational deployment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Retrospectively evaluated how moving-window length, count distribution, and weekday handling affected NobBS nowcast accuracy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance evaluation of a named nowcasting method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and retrospectively evaluates methods estimating occurred-but-not-reported malaria cases from historical delay patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a generalizable incidence-nowcasting framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a Bayesian model for nowcasting daily COVID-19 deaths by age and region while accounting for changing delay distributions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological treatment of stratified reporting-delay nowcasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a generalized-additive nowcasting model using individual patient data to correct backfilling in England's mpox curve.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit model development with a novel data-level application and real-time validation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and retrospectively evaluates a generalized-additive nowcasting model for delayed measles line-list data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit operational method development and predictive-performance assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a Bayesian hierarchical framework for joint nowcasting and forecasting of severe respiratory illness and COVID-positive subsets.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit new methodological framework benchmarked against an established Bayesian approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimated the pneumonic-plague reproduction number while accounting for reporting delay.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete outbreak application of reporting-delay-adjusted reproduction-number estimation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a data-driven method to nowcast the effective reproduction number from symptom-onset reports.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological proposal for reproduction-number nowcasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The title explicitly describes Bayesian inference, mapping, and nowcasting of reproduction numbers in British local authorities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 reproduction-number nowcasting application is explicit in the title; no abstract establishes method origination.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Integrates onset-date imputation, truncation adjustment, and reproduction-number estimation in a single generative Bayesian model.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development, simulation benchmarking, real-data comparison, and R-package integration.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a Bayesian method that jointly accounts for reporting delays and case-nowcast uncertainty when estimating time-varying reproduction numbers.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological proposal evaluated by simulation and applied to Belgian data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Retrospectively validates a reproduction-number nowcasting algorithm and quantifies improvements in lag, accuracy, and outbreak-growth detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance validation of nowcasting for real-time reproduction-number estimation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops Bayesian methodology for real-time reproduction-number estimation under case-reporting variability and serial-interval uncertainty.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development addressing reporting measurement error without delaying transmission-signal detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops updated negative-binomial risk models used to calculate predicted antimicrobial days for national SAAR benchmarks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological update to a national risk-adjusted benchmarking metric.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared patient-reported ART side-effect symptoms with electronic monitoring records and found gross under-recording.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of pharmacovigilance reporting completeness.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Developed and piloted an anonymous reporting method for patient harm caused by antimicrobial shortages.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a safety-event reporting method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Randomized parents to telephone-beep or routine reporting and measured the intervention's effect on AEFI reporting rates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducted active record-based surveillance of childhood AEFIs and compared detected rates with official passive reports.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application of active vaccine-safety surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically identified and clinically characterized reported progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy cases associated with fumaric-acid esters.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete post-treatment safety assessment of an opportunistic infectious adverse event.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically reviewed and classified Iranian case reports of possible adverse events after COVID-19 vaccination.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccine-safety evidence synthesis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews India's COVID-19 vaccine-pharmacovigilance system, highlighting underreporting and slow data collection and calling for active reporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit narrative review offering system-improvement guidance.

decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit operational pharmacovigilance and reporting implementation.
